markdown.markdown:
Contributions are welcome from R users, developers, and researchers.


- Repository: [github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime](https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime)
- Issues: [github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/issues](https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/issues)

## Ways to contribute

- Bug reports with reproducible examples
- Documentation improvements (website, vignettes, function examples)
- Tests (edge cases, regression tests)
- Performance improvements (vectorization, caching)
- New calendar entities / helpers

## Good first contributions

- Documentation improvements (examples, website pages, vignettes)
- Tests for edge cases (skipped entities, midnight-crossing end times)
- Performance improvements for batch conversions

A good place to start is GitHub Issues:

- [Issues](https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/issues)

## Reporting a bug (checklist)

Please include:

1. What you expected to happen
2. What actually happened
3. A minimal reproducible example (code + inputs)
4. Place inputs: latitude, longitude, timezone offset
5. Output of `sessionInfo()`

Bug report template snippet:

```text
Date(s):
Place: c(lat, lon, tz_offset)
Function call:
Expected:
Actual:
R sessionInfo():
```

## Development setup

Clone the repository and install development tools:

```r
install.packages(c("devtools", "testthat"))
```

Install from source (development workflow):

```r
devtools::install()
```

## Build

Build the package (including compact vignettes):

```r
devtools::build(args = c("--compact-vignettes=gs+qpdf"))
```

## Run checks

Local check:

```r
devtools::check(build_args = c("--compact-vignettes=gs+qpdf"))
```

CRAN-style check using rhub:

```r
# install.packages("rhub")
rhub::check_for_cran(check_args = c("--compact-vignettes=gs+qpdf"))
```

## Run tests

```r
devtools::test()
```

## Funding acknowledgement

Early development of this package was funded through **Google Summer of Code (GSoC)** in multiple years.
